Add shared savings component for cost reduction

Add penalties for claims processing delays
Modify readmission rate thresholds

Add value-based incentive tier structure
Revise dispute resolution procedures
Update indemnification limits
Add data sharing and analytics requirements
Modify network adequacy standards
